title: alisma palifolium
intro: Alisma palifolium, also known as the water plantain or madam heart, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Alismataceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alisma palifolium include reducing edema, relieving symptoms of kidney stones, and supporting the kidneys and urinary system. Alisma palifolium is typically prepared as a dried root or a decoction, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to create a variety of herbal preparations.
